verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All the saints and angels bow before Your throne All the elders cast their crowns before the Lamb of God and sing

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are worthy of it all, You are worthy of it all For from You are all things, And to You are all things, You deserve the glory

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Day and night, night and day, let incense arise Day and night, night and day, let incense arise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I exalt thee, I exalt thee I exalt thee, oh Lord
